Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The log shows a process for handling applications The activities are

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The main sequence seems to be RA VF AE AD SC AC

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In between AE and AD there may be a loop that repeats RMI then VF possibly multiple times

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets check the traces Case1 RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC Case2 RA VF AE AD SC AC Case3 RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: That suggests the block is optionally a sequence of one or more RMI followed by VF

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The segment between AE and AD can be described as optional segment one or more RMI then VF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This can be modeled as XOR between tau and a sequence of a loop for RMI and then VF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: LoopNode equals star of RMI and tau SeqLoopVF equals sequence of LoopNode and VF OptionalBlock equals X of tau and SeqLoopVF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Main sequence is RA then VF then AE then OptionalBlock then AD then SC then AC

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case2 no RMI choose tau and get RA VF AE AD SC AC good Case1 choose the other branch and get RMI VF good Case3 loop on RMI twice then VF good

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: The model is simple and balanced and there is no need for concurrency
